title: Crowded counter with overlapping bottles
visualObservation: AI-generated scene: multiple overlapping bottles and glare mean the app should ask the reviewer to isolate the product or split the photo into separate labels.
prompt: Photorealistic crowded tasting counter with four distilled spirits bottles overlapping each other, some labels blocked by bottle shoulders, a small tasting glass and corks nearby, mixed glare on glass. caveat: AI-generated demo/eval visual. Do not use as deterministic legal-text ground truth; generated label text may be inaccurate.
